title: Korak 28

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: Treba da uklonite oba poziva za print(lin_eq.solve()) i print(lin_eq.analyze()).
tests.testString:
({ test: () => runPython(`
assert not _Node(_code).has_call("print(lin_eq.analyze())")
assert not _Node(_code).has_call("print(lin_eq.solve())")
`) })

description: Sada, ukloni oba poziva od print(lin_eq.solve()) i print(lin_eq.analyze()) iz svog koda.
